title: Ugorian spore-gruel
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Ugorian spore-gruel''' was a foodstuff enjoyed by [[Ugor/Legends|Ugors]]. It was served in carafes. When meeting Ugors for the first time, the chef droid [[L9-G8]] excitedly considered preparing this dish as a welcoming present.

==Appearances==
*[[Scavenger Hunt (adventure)|''Scavenger Hunt'']]

[[Category:Ugorian food|Spore-gruel]]
